title: chenopodium oblanceolatum
intro: Chenopodium oblanceolatum, also known as a type of goosefoot plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium oblanceolatum are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
